summary: Iteration 32 testing: re-verified Zoom integration + error notifications. The iteration-31 frontend bug ('body stream already read' on wrong login) is FIXED — wrong login now displays 'Invalid email or password' toast. Backend: 7/8 tests passed, 1 skipped (real Zoom create-meeting requires meeting:write scopes — same external config block from iter-31). Admin login + dashboard fully functional.

minor.issue: Real Zoom meeting creation still skipped pending Zoom Marketplace scope addition (meeting:write:meeting + admin variant). Backend code is correct; raises HTTPException 500 'Failed to create video meeting' with the Zoom error message — verified.

issues: Grade/Class field uses browser-native <select> instead of shadcn Select component — inconsistent with rest of app. Minor visual inconsistency.

action_items: (USER ACTION) Add Zoom OAuth scopes 'meeting:write:meeting' and 'meeting:write:meeting:admin' in Zoom Marketplace > Server-to-Server OAuth app to enable real meeting creation. Backend code is correct; this is a config-only blocker.
(OPTIONAL) Replace native <select> on Identity Creator > Grade/Class with shadcn Select for design consistency.
(OPTIONAL) routes/classes.py start_class: wrap generate_zoom_sdk_signature() in try/except for clarity (currently outside the try block — would surface generic 500 if signature fails).
(OPTIONAL) Login.js handleLogin still uses ad-hoc data.detail check; could be unified with getApiError(res) helper from utils/api.js for consistency. Functionally correct now.
critical_code_review_comments: Login.js (lines 34-45) correctly handles 401 with try/catch on res.json() — falls back to status-based messages when proxy strips body. Verified working in browser.
utils/api.js getApiError uses res.clone() before reading — safe from double-consumption. Status fallback messages cover 400/401/403/404/409/422/429/500/502/503.

VideoClass.js: no Jitsi references remain. Zoom SDK Component View dynamically imports @zoom/meetingsdk/embedded (line 48) — good code-splitting. Screenshot button properly gated on isTeacher (line 218).

VideoClass.js handleTakeScreenshot uses navigator.mediaDevices.getDisplayMedia + ImageCapture.grabFrame() — works on Chrome/Edge but ImageCapture is unsupported on Firefox/Safari. Consider html2canvas fallback.
services/zoom.py captures ZOOM_* env vars at module-import time (lines 11-13). Module reload after .env change requires backend restart — currently OK but brittle.
server.py global Exception handler returns JSON 500 with proper content-type. FastAPI HTTPException is intercepted earlier (verified by 401 'Invalid credentials' response on wrong login).

success_rate.backend: 87.5% (7 passed / 1 skipped — Zoom external config; 0 failed)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (login error toast fixed, admin dashboard loads, no console errors)

seed_data_creation: Test creates+teardown TEST_-prefixed teacher user, user_session, class_session for Zoom start test. Cleaned up on fixture teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration-32 features verified. The Zoom real-meeting test (test_classes_start_returns_zoom_fields) will continue to skip until user adds 'meeting:write:meeting' scope in Zoom Marketplace. After scope is added, that test will assert the 200 response shape with zoom_meeting_id/zoom_join_url/zoom_password/zoom_signature/zoom_sdk_key. Frontend wrong-login bug from iter-31 is RESOLVED — verified via Playwright (toast text == 'Invalid email or password').
rca of the issue: The previous iteration's wrong-login bug ('body stream already read') was fixed in Login.js by wrapping res.json() in try/catch and falling back to status-based messages when JSON parse fails (proxy was stripping 401 body). Verified live: wrong creds now show 'Invalid email or password' as expected. The Zoom skip is purely external config — no code defect.
